MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories & Requests For Admissions, For An Order Deeming Requests For Admission Admitted & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian V. Donnelly for plaintiff and opposing party

NO OTHER APPEARANCE Stated. After Hearing TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modifications. Defendant SPZ Oakland Corporation's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is denied as moot as plaintiff has served responses to discovery after the filing of the instant motion. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the responses. However, the Court notes that by failing to respond in a timely fashion, objections were waived. In addition, there is no provision for general objections in the Code of Civil Procedure. The response to form interrogatory 17.1 is completely inadequate.

The Court finds that plaintiff failed to respond to discovery in a timely fashion, despite efforts by counsel for defendant to informally resolve the matter, thereby requiring the filing of the motion on two separate occasions. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $936.30 are to be paid within 14 days of notice of this order.
Modifications: 30 days to pay monetary sanctions. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
